_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: pasztork
data.message:
Add EKI RSI Support (#217)

* Add EKI server support for KSS driver

* Don't handle test error event

* Fix issue with lifecycle

* Add setup doc

* Change EKI RSI hardware interface to work with new external control SDK

* Rename hardware interfaces

* Add call to SystemInterface base class

* Fix first write happening twice

* Add initial implementation for plain RSI with extarnal control SDK

* Minor cleanup

* Clean up RSI configuration file

* Remove second stop request

* Add USE_EKI environment variable to jazzy workflow

* Use ros_rsi_ethernet.xml with ros_rsi context

* Format to pass checks

* Format to pass checks

* Change tests to use EKI RSI driver

* Remove unused varible to pass checks

* Remove unused client IP

* Implement startup checks

* Remove magic timeout

* Remove joint type check

* Remove magic number from plain RSI driver

* Make configuration fail if init data is non-compliant

* Rename method

* Fix link in doc

* Add option for turning dirves on and off

* Use proper return type names

* Depend on KSS-specific robot interface

* Add robot model check

* Create a single controller for all non-real time messages

* Use KSS-specific event observer

* Remove characters with accent

* Add ROS support for changing cycle time at runtime

* Use custom message for setting RSI cycle time

* Set default cycle time

* Rename cycle time command interface variable

* Poll robot status from EKI server

* Rename event handler extension

* Use IPO mode for RSI by default

* Activate hardware interface only if KRC in EXT

* Only update status when changed

* No need for DrivesEnabled status

* Remove missing state interface

* Initialize command interfaces on first status update

* Fix pre-commit issues

* Replace kuka_drive_handler with kuka_nrt_message_handler in package dependencies

* Jazzy API change

* Update documentation for the KSS driver

* Add required parameters to kuka_nrt_message_handler

* Add jazzy fix

* Use bigger timeout for switch controller

* Publish if there is a message that required the robot to be stopped

* Update KSS and Controllers documentation

* Update example robot model in KSS RSI documentation

* Set drives enabled to OFF by default

* Use condition variable instead of while loop

* Fix robot model name check

* Merge branch 'master' into feature/kss_ext_control_sdk

* fix hardware interface name

* align documentation format

* fix hardware interface class name

* run pre-commit

* Fix merge errors

* Fix license comment

* Make driver version runtime configurable

* Update tests

* Fix rsi_simulator

* Fix formatting

* Make PR changes

* Remove gmock test

* Apply PR suggestions

* Turn off drives by default

* Move KRL files and update documentation

* Add robot model verification for driver configuration

* Fix typo in documentation

* Lowercase robot model verification parameter

* Turn on drives when activating hardware interface

* Fix pre-commit issue

* Update RSI context file references and clarify usage for older versions

* Rename kss message handler

* Publish KSS status cyclically

* Move verify_robot_model argument in the doc

* Mention that KSS message handler only work for the EKI + RSI driver

* Increase hardware activation timeout

* Simplify robot model verification logic in on_init method

* Extract timeout and check interval constants for drives power activation

* Improve error handling

* Change warning to error log for unpowered drives in Read method

data.author: PetoAdam
data.message:
Migrate master branch to ROS Jazzy (#175)

* Add basic support for ros2 jazzy

* change ros-industrial ci to jazzy

* temporarily removed "got segment base" check for unittests

* temporarily removed got segment base checks for multi robot startups

* changed industrial_ci to run on ubuntu 24.04 noble

* configured test suite for rsi_simulator and added dummy test

* update readme from humble to jazzy

* remove unused segment base checks

* update readme

* update readme (CI and sonarcloud checks for both jazzy and humble)

* change readme github industrial ci link to redirect to github actions

* address code-formatting requirements (pre-commit)

* update README

* update tests with robot initialized check

---------

Co-authored-by: Áron Svastits <49677296+Svastits@users.noreply.github.com>
